title: U.S. warns banks of sanctions risk over China ‘teapot’ refineries handling Iranian oil
summary_full: The alert said China purchases approximately 90% of Iran's oil exports, with teapot refineries accounting for the majority of these imports.
summary_public: The alert said China purchases approximately 90% of Iran's oil exports, with teapot refineries accounting for the majority of these imports.

IR.label: negative
